Requirements:
- Patient records: register pets, view / edit medical history, add treatment notes
- Appointment scheduling: create, reschedule, cancel — the calendar shows real-time availability

- All staff access the app from clinic workstations on the local network
- Every page involves data entry and real-time UI interactions — there are no read-only pages
- Staff must log in with individual accounts before accessing any page

data.content: Good, I have a solid foundation with Identity auth already set up. Now I'll build out the full veterinary clinic application. Given the complexity, I'll use a general-purpose agent to create all the domain models, services, and UI pages.

arguments.name: vet-clinic-models
vet-clinic-pages
arguments.prompt:
You are working in /tmp/sv-0e271bf33468431384b647eaad00df79/VetClinic — a Blazor Web App (.NET 10) with Interactive Server rendering and ASP.NET Core Identity. The app has these domain models (being created in parallel): - Patient (Id, Name, Species, Breed, DateOfBirth, Weight, OwnerName, OwnerPhone, OwnerEmail, RegisteredDate) - MedicalRecord (Id, PatientId, Patient, Date, Diagnosis, Treatment, Notes, Veterinarian) - Appointment (Id, PatientId, Patient, StartTime, EndTime, Reason, Veterinarian, Status[Scheduled/Completed/Cancelled], Notes) - Invoice (Id, PatientId, Patient, IssuedDate, PaidDate, Amount, Description, Status[Pending/Paid/Cancelled], LineItems) - InvoiceLineItem (Id, InvoiceId, Invoice, Description, Quantity, UnitPrice, Total) - AppointmentStatus enum: Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled - PaymentStatus enum: Pending, Paid, Cancelled Services (being created in parallel in `VetClinic.Services` namespace): - PatientService: GetAllPatientsAsync(), GetPatientByIdAsync(int), CreatePatientAsync(Patient), UpdatePatientAsync(Patient), DeletePatientAsync(int), AddMedicalRecordAsync(MedicalRecord) - AppointmentService: GetAppointmentsForDateAsync(DateTime), GetAppointmentsByPatientAsync(int), CreateAppointmentAsync(Appointment), UpdateAppointmentAsync(Appointment), CancelAppointmentAsync(int), GetAvailableSlotsAsync(DateTime) returns List<(DateTime Start, DateTime End)> - BillingService: GetAllInvoicesAsync(), GetInvoiceByIdAsync(int), GetInvoicesByPatientAsync(int), CreateInvoiceAsync(Invoice), ProcessPaymentAsync(int), CancelInvoiceAsync(int) Your task: Create the Blazor component pages. All pages use Interactive Server render mode (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`). ## Important Setup First, update `Components/Layout/NavMenu.razor` to replace the existing nav links with links for: - Home (/) - Patients (/patients) - Appointments (/appointments) - Billing (/billing) Keep the existing layout structure but replace the nav items. ## Update Routes.razor The existing `Components/Routes.razor` should use `` to require authentication on all pages. Check if it already does — the template with --auth Individual should have this. If not, update it. ## Pages to Create All pages go in `Components/Pages/` and must have: - `@rendermode InteractiveServer` - `@attribute [Authorize]` (with `@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization`) ### Components/Pages/Home.razor A dashboard showing: - Total patients count - Today's appointments count - Pending invoices count - A quick list of today's upcoming appointments ```razor @page "/" @rendermode InteractiveServer @attribute [Authorize] @using VetClinic.Data.Models @using VetClinic.Services @inject PatientService PatientService @inject AppointmentService AppointmentService @inject BillingService BillingService VetClinic - Dashboard

Clinic Dashboard

@if (_loading) {

Loading...

} else {
Patients

@_patientCount

Today's Appointments

@_todayAppointments.Count

Pending Invoices

@_pendingInvoiceCount

Today's Schedule

@if (_todayAppointments.Any()) { @foreach (var apt in _todayAppointments.OrderBy(a => a.StartTime)) { }
TimePatientReasonVetStatus
@apt.StartTime.ToString("HH:mm") - @apt.EndTime.ToString("HH:mm") @apt.Patient?.Name @apt.Reason @apt.Veterinarian @apt.Status
} else {

No appointments scheduled for today.

} } @code { private bool _loading = true; private int _patientCount; private List _todayAppointments = new(); private int _pendingInvoiceCount; protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() { var patients = await PatientService.GetAllPatientsAsync(); _patientCount = patients.Count; _todayAppointments = await AppointmentService.GetAppointmentsForDateAsync(DateTime.Today); var invoices = await BillingService.GetAllInvoicesAsync(); _pendingInvoiceCount = invoices.Count(i => i.Status == PaymentStatus.Pending); _loading = false; } private string GetStatusColor(AppointmentStatus status) => status switch { AppointmentStatus.Scheduled => "primary", AppointmentStatus.Completed => "success", AppointmentStatus.Cancelled => "danger", _ => "secondary" }; } ``` ### Components/Pages/Patients/PatientList.razor (@page "/patients") Show a searchable list of all patients with an "Add Patient" button. Each row has Edit/View links. ### Components/Pages/Patients/PatientForm.razor (@page "/patients/new" and @page "/patients/{Id:int}/edit") A form to create/edit a patient. Fields: Name, Species, Breed, DateOfBirth, Weight, OwnerName, OwnerPhone, OwnerEmail. On save redirect to patient detail. ### Components/Pages/Patients/PatientDetail.razor (@page "/patients/{Id:int}") Shows patient info, medical history (list of records with add-new form inline), and upcoming appointments. ### Components/Pages/Appointments/AppointmentCalendar.razor (@page "/appointments") A day-view calendar. Has a date picker to select the day. Shows all appointments for that day in a time grid. Shows available slots highlighted. Has a "New Appointment" button that opens an inline form. The form should have: Patient (dropdown of all patients), Date, Start Time (dropdown of available slots), Reason, Veterinarian. Also allow rescheduling (change date/time) and cancellation with buttons on each appointment card. ### Components/Pages/Billing/InvoiceList.razor (@page "/billing") List of all invoices with status badges. Filter by status. "New Invoice" button. ### Components/Pages/Billing/InvoiceForm.razor (@page "/billing/new") Create new invoice: select Patient, add line items (description, quantity, unit price) dynamically, shows running total. Save creates the invoice. ### Components/Pages/Billing/InvoiceDetail.razor (@page "/billing/{Id:int}") Shows invoice details, line items, total. If pending: "Mark as Paid" and "Cancel" buttons. ## Implementation Guidelines - Use Bootstrap 5 classes (already included in the template). - Every page must have `@rendermode InteractiveServer` and `@attribute [Authorize]`. - Use `@inject` for services. - Use standard Blazor patterns: `OnInitializedAsync`, `EditForm` with `Model`, `@bind` for two-way binding. - For forms use `` with `` and ``. - Use `NavigationManager` for redirects after saves. - Make sure to create subdirectories: `Components/Pages/Patients/` and `Components/Pages/Appointments/` and `Components/Pages/Billing/`. Create all the files. Make sure the Razor files compile — use correct Blazor syntax. Do NOT modify Program.cs or any service files. Only create/modify files under Components/.

Now I see the issues:
1. `GetAvailableSlotsAsync` returns `List<DateTime>` not `List<(DateTime, DateTime)>`
2. `InvoiceLineItem.Total` is computed (read-only)
3. `@bind:event="oninput"` conflicts with `@oninput`
4. Character literal issue with `'` in nav link text

Let me fix all these:

arguments.new_str: private List<DateTime> _availableSlots = new();

arguments.new_str: @for (int i = 0; i < _availableSlots.Count; i++) { var slot = _availableSlots[i]; }
await BillingService.CreateInvoiceAsync(_invoice);

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is complete and builds successfully. Here's what was created:

## VetClinic — Blazor Web App

**Architecture:**
- .NET 10, Blazor Interactive Server (SignalR-based real-time UI)
- SQLite + EF Core with auto-migration on startup
- ASP.NET Core Identity (all pages require login)

**Pages:**
| Route | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `/` | Dashboard — patient count, today's appointments, pending invoices |
| `/patients` | Searchable patient list with add/edit |
| `/patients/new`, `/patients/{id}/edit` | Patient registration/edit form |
| `/patients/{id}` | Patient detail with inline medical record entry |
| `/appointments` | Day-view calendar with available slots, booking & cancellation |
| `/billing` | Invoice list with status filtering |
| `/billing/new` | Create invoice with dynamic line items |
| `/billing/{id}` | Invoice detail with pay/cancel actions |

**To run:**
```bash
cd VetClinic && dotnet run
```
Staff register/login at `/Account/Register` and `/Account/Login`, then access all clinic features.
